# mxroute Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "mxroute" {
  # All three may be omitted and read from the environment instead:
  #   MXROUTE_SERVER, MXROUTE_USERNAME, MXROUTE_API_KEY
  server   = "heracles.mxrouting.net"
  username = "myusername"
  api_key  = var.mxroute_api_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key, sent as `X-API-Key`. Falls back to the `MXROUTE_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `server` (String) MXroute mail server hostname, sent as `X-Server`. Falls back to the `MXROUTE_SERVER` environment variable.
- `username` (String) DirectAdmin username, sent as `X-Username`. Falls back to the `MXROUTE_USERNAME` environment variable.
